what_it_does: Records metadata for an image asset named p-14 in the design-source channel, identifying it as SOURCE design ground-truth for deck1-2026/p-14.jpg and pointing it to a content-addressed blob.
observations: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter describing an image resource
Image dimensions w and h are both 0
Body text labels the file as SOURCE design ground-truth
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 despite being an image record
Blob-backed reference with no outgoing links
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, and created fields
Declares an image:// address scheme for the asset
Uses a blob:// URI for content addressing
Separates machine metadata from a short human-readable source note
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, suggesting missing or placeholder metadata
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
The blob hash cannot be verified from the file alone
notes: A provenance stub for a single design-source image page with unresolved dimensions and no recorded links to other records.
questions: Why are width and height recorded as 0?
What does the blob://b2 scheme specifically denote?
Is this record auto-generated or manually authored?
What is the intended relationship between id, address, and path?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as SOURCE design ground-truth and it does record source metadata for the image, but the zero dimensions mean it is a partial ground-truth record.
intention_signals: Create a stable, traceable ledger entry for a design-source image so downstream systems can reference it by id, address, and blob.
novelty: The explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' status combined with image:// channel addressing and a blob reference for a design deck page.
contribution: A stable identifier and blob pointer for the deck1-2026/p-14 image, plus provenance metadata such as author session, creation time, and source label, that can anchor references to this design artifact.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger record with YAML frontmatter describing the image asset deck1-2026/p-14 in the design-source channel, including a blob reference, MIME type, author session, creation timestamp, and a SOURCE design ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a traceable, content-addressed reference for a design-source image used as ground truth.
